LanguageData.InstallNCL_King_of_the_field.label: King of the Field
LanguageData.InstallNCL_King_of_the_field.description:
Crafted from the neural core extracted after defeating a Doxa-0, this implant embodies Doxa-0's mastery of battlefield awareness. Upon installation, the mechanitor gains global remote command of all allied mechanoids - orders bypass visual range, distance, and transmission latency, transforming the user into a true war command hub that turns mechanical forces into pure, efficient war machines.
Simultaneously unlocks the 'Omni-Directive' ability: Activates the mechanoid-wide coordination matrix, temporarily boosting all allied mechanical units' movement speed for rapid cross-front deployment and zero-latency response - weaving tactical networks as Doxa-0 once did to dominate battlefield tempo.
LanguageData.InstallSolarbaneArtemisLunarOculus.label: Solarbane Artemis Lunar Oculus
LanguageData.InstallSolarbaneArtemisLunarOculus.descr: Product of NCL Division 23's "Moonchild" project. Its photon-collapse iris enables lunar-triggered overclocking, but daylight exposure induces quantum decoherence that impairs the implantee's daytime vision.
LanguageData.InstallUnstablePrometheusCore.label: Unstable Prometheus Core
LanguageData.InstallUnstablePrometheusCore.descriptio: This energy core replaces the heart, equipped with titanium-tungsten ceramic chambers housing 3,600 nano-neural clusters. Generates photonic jets through electrolysis of bloodborne iron.
LanguageData.InstallYggdrasilWorldTreeSpine.label: Yggdrasil World Tree Spine
LanguageData.InstallYggdrasilWorldTreeSpine.descripti: Inspired by the mythical World Tree, this bionic incorporates quantum shift technology and bio-immuno enhancement systems to grant implantees unparalleled battlefield dominance and survivability.
